checks.description: Imported benchmark is backed by a DOI-addressed Zenodo software archive.
The benchmark uses a periodic SU(2) plaquette chain with P=4 and jmax=0.5.

admissibility.notes: External benchmark generated from Zenodo record 10.5281/zenodo.16739090, file su2lgt-main.zip, using the periodic k=0 exact diagonalization path for P=4, jmax=0.5, g^2=1.5.

provenance.notes: Downloaded archive md5 7c09478c1d2b2816d416e564695d0bc0. Eigenvalues were generated in ignored study-runs with the Zenodo package: create_basics.py; periodic/states_periodic_k0_undocumented.py 4 0.5 0; periodic/plaquette_periodic_k0.py 4 0.5 0; periodic/eigensystem_periodic_k0.py 4 0.5 0 1.5.
